caption: A man wearing a grey wig, glasses, headphones, and a white shirt with a bow tie and suspenders is speaking into a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photographs and posters. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with various pictures, including a "LEE" logo on a yellow background. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is superimposed on the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, his facial expression shifting slightly and his mouth moving as he delivers his words. He remains in the same position relative to the microphone and the background, with only subtle changes in his head tilt and facial animation throughout the clip.
